scenarios.description: Dynamax at level 0 multiplies max HP by 1.5x (ERRATA #19)
scenarios.note: Dynamax HP: floor(baseMaxHP × (1.5 + level × 0.05)). Level 0 = 1.5×. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #19

scenarios.description: Dynamax at level 10 multiplies max HP by 2.0x (ERRATA #19)
scenarios.note: Dynamax HP: floor(baseMaxHP × (1.5 + level × 0.05)). Level 10 = 2.0×. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #19

scenarios.description: Dynamax lasts exactly 3 turns, then the Pokemon automatically reverts
scenarios.note: Dynamax duration: 3 turns. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts Dynamax

scenarios.description: Max Flare (Fire type) from a 90 BP Fire source move has 130 power (higher power table — ERRATA #20)
scenarios.note: Max Flare uses the higher power table vs Max Knuckle/etc. 90 BP source → 130. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts ERRATA #20

scenarios.description: Max Knuckle (Fighting type) from a 90 BP Fighting source move has 90 power (lower power table — ERRATA #20)
scenarios.note: Max Knuckle uses the lower power table vs Max Flare/etc. 90 BP source → 90. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts ERRATA #20

scenarios.description: Max Flare (Fire type) from a 130+ BP Fire source move has 150 power (higher table cap)
scenarios.note: Max Flare power cap for 130+ BP source is 150. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts ERRATA #20

scenarios.description: G-Max Wildfire deals residual Fire damage for 4 turns and does NOT set Sunny Day weather (ERRATA #21)
scenarios.note: G-Max Wildfire: 1/6 max HP residual fire damage for 4 turns; no weather set. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts ERRATA #21

scenarios.description: Libero/Protean in Gen 8 activates every move (NOT once-per-switch-in — that is Gen 9 — ERRATA #23)
scenarios.note: Libero Gen 8: changes type on every move. Gen 9 restricted it to once per switch-in. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts ERRATA #23

scenarios.description: Neutralizing Gas suppresses all other Pokemon's ability effects while the bearer is active
scenarios.note: Neutralizing Gas: on-field presence suppresses all other abilities. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/abilities.ts NeutralizingGas

scenarios.description: Terrain boosts are 1.3x in Gen 8+ (not 1.5x — that was Gen 7 — ERRATA #17)
scenarios.note: Electric Terrain multiplier changed from 1.5× (Gen 7) to 1.3× (Gen 8+). Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #17

scenarios.description: Body Press has 80 base power and uses the user's Defense stat for damage (ERRATA #22: NOT 130 BP)
scenarios.note: Body Press: 80 BP, uses Defense in place of Attack for damage calc. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts ERRATA #22

scenarios.description: Max Quake (Ground) raises Special Defense on the user's side by +1 stage
scenarios.note: Max Quake secondary effect: +1 SpDef for user's side. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts MaxQuake

scenarios.description: Max Airstream (Flying) raises Speed on the user's side by +1 stage
scenarios.note: Max Airstream secondary effect: +1 Speed for user's side. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts MaxAirstream

scenarios.description: Corviknight's G-Max Wind Rage clears all entry hazards on the target's side
scenarios.note: G-Max Wind Rage: removes Stealth Rock, Spikes, Toxic Spikes, Sticky Web from opponent's side. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts GMaxWindRage

scenarios.description: A Pokemon that has used Dynamax cannot also Mega Evolve or use Z-Moves in the same battle
scenarios.note: Gimmick mutual exclusion: Dynamax, Mega Evolution, and Z-Moves cannot coexist in one battle. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: Max Guard blocks all moves for one turn (similar to Protect) including some Z-Moves
scenarios.note: Max Guard: protects for 1 turn, blocks all moves. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/moves.ts MaxGuard

scenarios.description: Galarian Rapidash is Psychic/Fairy type (not Fire like Kantonian Rapidash)
scenarios.note: Galarian Rapidash: Psychic/Fairy. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/pokedex.ts RapidashGalar

scenarios.description: Drizzle/Drought/Sandstorm/Snow Warnings set weather for 5 turns (unchanged from Gen 6)
scenarios.note: Weather duration without Damp Rock/Heat Rock etc: 5 turns in Gen 8. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: Steel type resists Fairy damage (unchanged from Gen 6 when Fairy was introduced)
scenarios.note: Steel resists Fairy: 0.5× effectiveness. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown data/typechart.ts

scenarios.description: Stealth Rock vs Clefairy (Fairy type) = neutral = 1/8 HP (Fairy added Gen 6; not super effective or resisted vs Rock)
scenarios.note: Fairy is neutral to Rock type chart. Stealth Rock deals 1/8 max HP. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts

scenarios.description: Dynamax at level 5 multiplies max HP by 1.75x
scenarios.note: Dynamax HP formula: 1.5 + 0.05 × level. Level 5 = 1.75×. Source: smogon/pokemon-showdown sim/battle-actions.ts ERRATA #19
